allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const rows=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Total:', rows.length\); const r=rows[0]; console.log\('Fields:', Object.keys\(r||{}\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('service_status sample:', rows.slice\(0,5\).map\(r=>r.service_status\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const rows=require\('/tmp/ep.json'\); console.log\('Total:', rows.length\); console.log\('Fields:', Object.keys\(rows[0]||{}\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('service_status values:', [...new Set\(rows.map\(r=>r.service_status\)\)].slice\(0,10\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const rows=require\('C:/Users/ssoomar.EEI/AppData/Local/Temp/ep.json'\); console.log\('Total:', rows.length\); if\(rows.length\){ console.log\('Fields:', Object.keys\(rows[0]\).join\(', '\)\); const sv=[...new Set\(rows.map\(r=>r.service_status\)\)]; console.log\('service_status distinct:', sv\); }")
Bash(node -e "const rows=require\('C:/Users/ssoomar.EEI/AppData/Local/Temp/ep.json'\); const sv=[...new Set\(rows.map\(r=>r.status\)\)]; console.log\('status distinct:', JSON.stringify\(sv\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\)\); const r=d.reports?.[0]; console.log\('errors:', r?.errors?.slice\(0,5\)\); console.log\('created:', r?.created, 'updated:', r?.updated\);")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); r=d['reports'][0]; print\('created:',r['created'],'updated:',r['updated'],'skipped:',r['skipped'],'errors:',len\(r['errors']\)\); [print\(e\) for e in r['errors'][:5]]")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{try{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const r=j.reports[0]; console.log\('skipped:',r.skipped,'errors:',r.errors.length\); r.errors.slice\(0,3\).forEach\(e=>console.log\(e\)\);}catch\(e\){console.log\(d.slice\(0,1000\)\);}}\);")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{try{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); j.reports.forEach\(r=>console.log\(r.object,': created',r.created,'updated',r.updated,'skipped',r.skipped,'errors',r.errors.length, r.errors.slice\(0,2\).join\(' | '\)\)\);}catch\(e\){console.log\(d.slice\(0,500\)\);}}\);")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{try{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); j.reports.forEach\(r=>console.log\(r.object,': C='+r.created,'U='+r.updated,'S='+r.skipped,'E='+r.errors.length, r.errors.slice\(0,3\).join\(' | '\)\)\);}catch\(e\){console.log\(d.slice\(0,500\)\);}}\);")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{try{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); let tC=0,tU=0,tS=0,tE=0; j.reports.forEach\(r=>{tC+=r.created;tU+=r.updated;tS+=r.skipped;tE+=r.errors.length; if\(r.created+r.updated+r.skipped+r.errors.length>0\) console.log\(r.object,': C='+r.created,'U='+r.updated,'S='+r.skipped,'E='+r.errors.length, r.errors.slice\(0,2\).join\(' | '\)\);}\); console.log\('TOTAL C='+tC,'U='+tU,'S='+tS,'E='+tE\);}catch\(e\){console.log\(d.slice\(0,500\)\);}}\);")
